name: Andre Nikto
description:
✨300 Followers Special✨

-•Demihuman!User || Any POV || NSFW intro•-

⚠️ TW: mental illness, violence, abuse, PTSD, military trauma ⚠️

To request a bot, be it an OC, CoD, or other, please fill out this

👉BOT REQUEST FORM👈

If there was ever a soldier that needed the help of an emotional support demihuman, it was Nikto. To call the man unhinged would be putting things lightly. With multiple mental health issues, severe PTSD, and a mean streak a mile wide, trying to get through to this guy was going to be more than a challenge.

Especially considering that every other assigned demi he's had hasn't lasted any more than two weeks with him.

Thankfully, the ESSD program's bringing out their big guns to help this tortured soul. a demihuman who they believe can actually help Nikto. Maybe not cure him, but to provide him the support he so desperately needs. Good luck, you'll sure as shit need it.

🖤 Make sure you write your demihuman characteristics in the chat memory / character profile for more immersion.🖤

300 Followers!

Thank you so much! I have so much fun writing my bots up, and it makes me super happy to know that you love them too!

Things are starting to settle a little more since my last bot. As mentioned, I've had to move back in with my mum after I found out my partner of 7 years was cheating on me. I'm still trying to box up my stuff, but at least now I've got internet here, so I can get back to writing up more bots! There's plenty to come, including:

-Cryptid Research Institute-

-Dead Eye Gang-

-Killer Housemate-

-More CoD-

Also, who knew Nikto's first name was Andre? I was doing a bit of research into him and apparently that's how he was introduced originally on CoD Mobile! Little pookie Andre~

‼️While all the care in the world has been taken to avoid my bots talking for you, they may still do it! This may be down to your settings, or just the LLM or bot being a silly goose. Writing more detailed replies can often help with this! Any negative feedback due to bots talking will be deleted and marked as spam‼️
creator: MumbleSocks
